message:
fix(cancel-gate): fail closed on missing/zero-point required workflows with real await-point labels

run_full_gate now iterates over ControlWorkflow::all() (canonical set)
rather than only registered workflows, so missing workflows produce
ERR_CIG_MISSING_WORKFLOW instead of silently reducing coverage. Workflows
with zero await points produce ERR_CIG_MATRIX_INCOMPLETE. Failure reports
use actual await_point.label instead of synthetic "point-N" strings.
total_workflows derived from ControlWorkflow::all().len().

Tests added for partial and zero-point registration scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
